title: Amazon Detective Behavior Graph
description: Schema representing an Amazon Detective behavior graph resource. A behavior graph is a linked set of data generated by Detective from the source data of an AWS account, used to conduct security investigations.

Arn.description: The ARN of the behavior graph.

CreatedTime.description: The date and time that the behavior graph was created.

Members.description: The member accounts associated with the behavior graph.

DatasourcePackages.description: The data source packages enabled for the behavior graph.

Tags.description: The tags associated with the behavior graph.

AccountId.description: The AWS account identifier for the member account.

EmailAddress.description: The AWS account root user email address for the member account.

GraphArn.description: The ARN of the behavior graph.

AdministratorId.description: The AWS account identifier of the administrator account for the behavior graph.

Status.description: The current membership status of the member account.

InvitedTime.description: The date and time that Detective sent the invitation to the member account.

UpdatedTime.description: The date and time that the member account was last updated.

VolumeUsageInBytes.description: Total volume of data in bytes.

VolumeUsageUpdateTime.description: The data and time when the usage was last updated.
